cloverRetributionBeginnerGuide.title: Clover Retribution Beginner Guide
cloverRetributionBeginnerGuide.intro: This Clover Retribution beginner route helps you avoid wasted spins and early stat resets.

items.title: Join official game hubs
items.body: Join the Roblox game page and official Roblox community before redeeming group-gated rewards.

items.title: Redeem code rewards first
items.body: Claim active codes in the main menu and save part of your spins for your final build.

items.title: Use quests for stable leveling
items.body: Story and repeatable quests provide steady EXP and cleaner early progression.

items.title: Match stats to your combat plan
items.body: Balance Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Constitution around your core magic and weapon style.

cloverRetributionMagicGrimoireTierList.title: Clover Retribution Magic and Grimoire Tier List
cloverRetributionMagicGrimoireTierList.intro: Compare Clover Retribution magic options by tier, role, and upgrade ceiling.

cloverRetributionRaceTierList.title: Clover Retribution Race Tier List

cloverRetributionTraitsTierList.title: Clover Retribution Traits Tier List

cloverRetributionStatsWeaponsCraftingGui.title: Clover Retribution Stats Weapons and Crafting Guide
cloverRetributionStatsWeaponsCraftingGui.intro: Plan Clover Retribution stats and equipment so your weapon route and magic route scale together.

items.name: Stat Allocation
items.description: Prioritize Intelligence for magic-centric builds, then add Constitution for survivability.

items.name: Weapon Scaling
items.description: Use Dexterity and Strength where your weapon class gets the best return.

items.name: Crafting Loop
items.description: Farm repeatable routes, then convert materials at blacksmith milestones.

items.name: Build Timing
items.description: Delay hard rerolls until you lock race and trait targets.

cloverRetributionUpdateLogDevilRaceGuide.title: Clover Retribution Update Log and Devil Race Guide
cloverRetributionUpdateLogDevilRaceGuide.intro: Follow Clover Retribution update cycles and prioritize Devil Race preparation goals.

items.title: Devil Race Release Window
items.description: Keep a spin reserve and level checkpoints ready before major race updates.

items.title: Patch Priority
items.description: Review balancing notes for magic and trait shifts after each update.

items.title: Code Spike Timing
items.description: Redeem update-day code batches first because they usually include the largest reroll packages.

faq.title: Clover Retribution
faq.subtitle: Common Clover Retribution questions for new and returning players.

questions.question: How do I redeem Clover Retribution codes?
questions.answer: Open Clover Retribution, use the main-menu code box, paste the code exactly, and submit before entering your server.

questions.question: What is the best Clover Retribution route for beginners?
questions.answer: Join the official group, redeem active codes, level through repeatable quests, and commit to rerolls only after testing your preferred magic path.

questions.question: Where can I find official Clover Retribution updates?
questions.answer: Use the Clover Retribution Discord and Trello links in the resource module for official notices and system references.

cta.title: Start Your Clover Retribution Build
cta.description: Use the modules above to lock your race, magic, trait, and progression path.
